caption:
🎮🎨2026 May MMU GDC Game Jam🎶 🕹️

Hello everyone, we are organising a new game jam for all of you😁 we are opening it to any MMU student. Don't be afraid to join if you are interested 😉. 

Please note that the Discord in the QR code is different than our community Discord. Once you go there, you will find more information about the game jam. 

If you still have any questions then you can DM us here or ask in the comments😊

🎮💻GDC High Committee Recruitment 2025📄🕹️

Hello everyone 👋, the Game Developers Club is very excited to announce that we are once again opening up recruitment for the High Committee🎉. 

The recruitment is open to everyone in MMU, regardless of faculty😊. 

You can check out the form by scanning the QR code above. If you have any questions then you can ask in the comments or our DMs are always open. We hope to see you there😉.

Hey everyone! 🎮✨
GDC committee registration is now OPEN!

If you’re interested in game dev, events, design, or just want to be part of a fun and active team, this is your chance 🤝🏻
No experience needed, just your interest and willingness to learn!

Register here: https://forms.gle/1gLPpkufmTreGqRS9
(or scan the QR code!)

See you in GDC! 🔥

🕹️🎩 GDC @ April 2026 CSRW🎮🏫

The Game Developers Club or GDC for short will be opening the doors to the wonderland of game development🎲 

Come on over to our booth where we can unveil the events that we organize😉. Such as our studio visits and game workshops. We will also be showcasing some games that our members have made😁

If you can brave the unknown and jump into the rabbit hole🐰 then come on over to the CLC, we're booth CP8. 

If you have any further questions then you can just DM this page or ask in the comments below😊

🕹️💻The 2026 GDC AGM Highlights🎮📷

Our first event of the new year was the 2026 Annual General Meeting of the GDC🎊. We were fortunate that so many people managed to come out and help give life to the event🎉

A big thank you to all the people who truly made the night special, our attendees❤️ 

Stay tuned as we will announce some events planned for the year💫

👾🎮 MMU GDC Game Jam 2025 - It's a Wrap! 🎉

We're thrilled to announce that the game jam is finally over, and a huge thank you to our amazing sponsor FoodTime for fueling creativity!🍴

Congratulations to the winners of the game jam, who beat the fierce competition to come out on top:

🥇 1st Place - Team Error 404
🥈 2nd Place - Kotak Kosong
🥉 3rd Place - Team Team

Thank you to everyone who participated and made this game jam unforgettable. We hope you enjoyed the event, and see you again next time! 👋

📣 2 DAYS LEFT!

The pressure’s rising, but so is our excitement 🔥👾
You’ve got 48 hours to grab your gear, prep your snacks, and maybe sleep a little… maybe 😴🎮

🚨 It’s official! 🚨
Introducing Sunway Game Development Club (SGDC)! \(≧▽≦)/

We’re beyond excited to kick off the game dev scene right here at Sunway! 🎮✨

📅 Date: 10 June 2025
🕒 Time: 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM
📍 Venue: iLabs, Sunway University
🍽️ Refreshments provided!
Registration Link: https://lu.ma/wje0qw07

Come hear all about our vision, mission, and the exciting plans ahead!
We’re also thrilled & honored to be joined by our beloved guest speakers from @apugdc and @gdcmmu . ^-^

Whether you’re a hardcore dev, a gamer, or just curious, everyone’s welcome!
Let’s build something epic together at SGDC! ʕ •ᴥ•ʔ

Designed by: @van_ice_09

#SunwayGameDevelopmentClub #SGDC #SunwayCollege #SunwayUniversity #APUGameDevelopmentClub #APUGDC #AsianPasificUniversity #GameDevelopersClubMMU #GDCMMU #MultimediaUniversity #GameDevelopment

🚨 1 DAY LEFT!

Sound the alarms, it’s almost time to jam! 🚀🎧
Your game dev destiny awaits — and no, there’s no patch for procrastination 😅💻

🧑‍⚖️🎮Game Jam Judge Reveal🕹️🎉

We're one day away from the end of the game jam, so that makes it the perfect time to unveil the judges for our event😁

Firstly, we have Alitt Khaliq who is both the founder & CEO of Albrite Studios👏. Next up is Jason Spencer, the associate design director of Virtuous KL😇. Finally, we have long time GDC High Committee member and Unreal Engine authorised instructor, Zubaida Nila😎.

We wish all the participants the best of luck and may the best game win🎮.

⏰🚀 Game Jam Timeline Tentative 📅🎮

Gear up—here’s the schedule for the big event! 

🗓️ Day 1: Kickoff + Theme Announcement 
💻 Day 2: Coding & Designing Marathon 
🎉 Final Day: Submissions + Judging + Winners Revealed! 

Stay tuned for updates, and get ready to build something amazing! ⚡

🚀 GAME JAM ALERT! 🎮 
Wanna build a game in just 3 days? Grab your squad (or go solo), unleash your creativity, and let’s make something epic from scratch or free assets!

Scan the QR + sign up now! 💥 Any issues? Slide into our DMs — we got you! 💌 Let’s jam, devs! ⭐

🕹️🌏GDC @ November 2025 CSRW🎮🏫

Come one and all globe-trotters🌎 as the Game Developers Club or GDC for short is very excited to showcase what the club has to offer for both new students coming in from this intake or older ones with an interest in game development🎮

Come on over to our booth where we can regale you with tales of the events that we organize😉. Such as our studio visits and game workshops. We will also be showcasing some games that our members have made😁

If you believe that an adventure across the world can even begin on your screen🗺️ Come on over to the CLC, we're booth #21. 

If you have any further questions then you can just DM this page or ask in the comments below😊

🎮📱 Game Jam FAQ 🕹️💻

Want to know more about the game jam? We’ve got you covered! 😊 Here are the answers to a few questions you might have!

Stuck or have more questions that weren't answered here? Slide into our DMs or drop a comment down below—we’re happy to help! 💬✨

🕹️🚗GDC @ August 2025 CSRW🎮🏫

Start your engines🚘 as the Game Developers Club or GDC for short is very excited to showcase what the club has to offer for both new students coming in from this intake or older ones with an interest in game development🎮

Come on over to our booth where we can regale you with tales of the events that we organize😉. Such as our studio visits and game workshops. We will also be showcasing some games that our members have made😁

So if this revs your engine then you can find us at the CLC, we're booth #26.

If you have any further questions then you can just DM this page or ask in the comments below😊

🚀🎮 Get ready to level up your game dev dreams! 🎮🚀

Industry Talk: Tales from QA — The Game Dev Journey
👾 Featuring Amerz Chek from Larian Studios (yep, the Baldur’s Gate legends!)
📆 23 May 2025 
🕹️ 10:45AM–12:00PM
🎥 FCA Cinema
🌟 OPEN TO EVERYONE — Don’t miss this epic quest into the world of game development!

🕹️💻MMU GDC Minecraft Server Opening🎮🎲

We have opened a modded Minecraft server for anyone that has joined our discord server☺️

If you want to participate then you can scan the QR code to join the discord and there are instructions in the server💻

🎉 IT’S GAME JAM TIME!

Code, create, and conquer 💥👨‍💻👩‍💻
Let the 72-hour madness begin — may the bugs be ever in your favor 🐛⚔️

🚀 3 DAYS LEFT ‘TIL BLAST OFF! 🌌
Game Jam is launching soon and we’re SO ready to code, create, and maybe cry (just a little) 😭🎮💥

Grab your team, your snacks, and your best game dev energy—‘cause it’s about to get real! ⌛✨

🌟 A Huge Thank You to Our Amazing Sponsor! 🙏🎮

The GDC Game Jam 2025 was a blast, and it wouldn’t have been possible without the incredible support of our sponsor, FoodTime! 💛 

Your generosity helped fuel creativity, innovation, and unforgettable moments—thank you for being part of this journey! 🚀

📸✨ Behind the Scenes of MMU GDC Game Jam 2025 🕹️

We made sure to snapshot every moment of the game jam—from the opening ceremony and industry talk to the late-night grind with all the devs in the zone 🧑‍💻👩‍💻

Swipe through ➡️ and see if you can spot yourself or your team! If you missed the jam, this is your chance to feel the vibe ✨

Once again, a huge thank you to our sponsor FoodTime for making this all happen, and to the participants who poured their creativity into this weekend 🫶🏼

😇🕹️Game Developers Club visits Virtuos KL 🎮💻

On the 27th of November, the GDC had the absolute pleasure of visiting Virtuos Studio💜. The visit started with a small welcoming note and a breakdown on who Virtuous Studio is as a company. 

After that Virtuous had a Q&A session led by the General Manager , Mufizal Mokhtar, and the Lead Game Designer, Randy Vasquez. It was highly informative and gave the attendees great insight into game development🤓. 

We would like to extend a very big thank you to VirtuosKL for opening their doors to us and also to Emira for facilitating all of this😊.

🎮✨ GDC AGM 2025 – A Day to Remember!

It was an incredible day filled with inspiring talks, creative energy, and amazing people! 💡 Huge THANK YOU to everyone who joined us and made this event a success.

🌟 Highlights:
🗣️ Inspiring speeches from our speakers.
🤝 Meeting passionate students.
🎯 Exciting plans for the year ahead.

This is just the beginning! Let’s make 2025 a year of growth, creativity, and taking game development to the next level. 🚀

#GDC2025 #GameDevelopersClub #LevelUp #GameOn #CreativeCommunity

🕹️😉GDC Event Teaser😮🎮

Hello everyone, we have a very special event coming up in May that we're sure that you will enjoy. Keep your eyes peeled for tomorrow👀

👾Game Developers Club AGM!👾

We hope you are excited, because GDC will soon have another Annual Grand Meeting!!! 🔥🔥🔥😳

Join us as we show you what the club is all about. Presenting future events like workshops, hangouts and maybe even some industry visits 😏😏. Refreshments will be provided so you don't even have to worry about missing dinner. 

Don't miss this chance to meet new people and participate in our club's activities! See you soon!

😇🕹️MMU Game Developers Club x Virtuos Studio Visit 🎮💻

Hello everyone👋, next week we will be paying a visit to Virtuos Studio. If you would like to join then you can scan the QR code above😊. 

Be aware that we are only allowing a limited number of people to join so register quickly before the form closes⏰. 

If you have any questions then you can DM us.

🕹️💻Game Jam Registration📲🎮

If you have seen our recent posts and were wondering how to join, then here you are😊. After you scan the QR code, you will need to create a YouthOS account then you can fill up the information as usual📜

If you have any issues then please don't hesitate to DM us!

🎮💻Stylised Game Asset Texturing Workshop: Hidden Tips and Tricks in Substance Painter🕹️🏫

As announced during the AGM, we have a workshop organised by one of our members. It is the Stylised Game Asset Texturing Workshop, and will be held by Valeria, a member of the GDC's R&D team💻. 

The workshop aims to teach students Adobe Substance Painter tips that Valeria learned during her internship as a texture artist in an animation studio: how to setup filters and generators, how to create perfect fabric stitches and zippers, and more hidden tricks that are not usually taught in class. In the end, you will have a textured stylized game asset and more knowledge of the program. 

Below are the details of the event:

📆Date: 23 January 2025
🕙Time: 7:00pm - 9:00pm
🏫Venue: CLBR1023

🎮💻Stylised Game Asset Texturing Workshop Highlights🕹️📷

One of our members of the GDC team, @uhunbelievable , had conducted a texturing workshop which turned out amazingly😁. These are a few moments that we felt truly represented this event. 

Thank you to Valeria for conducting this workshop and a very special thank you to everyone who participated as well☺️

🎮💻GDC High Committee Recruitment📄🕹️

Hello everyone 👋, the Game Developers Club is very excited to announce that we are opening up recruitment for the High Committee🎉. 

The recruitment is open to everyone in MMU, regardless of faculty😊.

You can check out the form by scanning the QR code above. If you have any questions then you can ask in the comments or our DMs are always open. We hope to see you there😉.

🎮🎨MMU GDC Game Jam😎🕹️

If you have seen our post yesterday then the announcement we have for you is that we are organising a game jam😁

This exciting opportunity is open to any uni students, regardless of whether you are in MMU or not. So don't be afraid to join if you are interested 😉. 

Below are the details of the event:
Team: 1 - 4 people
Engine: Open to any engines
Fee: Free/None
Mode: Physical @ MMU Cyberjaya
Date: 23rd-25th May

More details will be revealed later. If you have any questions then you can DM us here or ask in the comments😊

caption:
📄🕹 GDC Survey: Evaluating the FCI Game Development Specialisation 💻🎮

Calling all FCI Game Development specialization Graduates and Final-Year Students!

The Game Developers Club (GDC) is conducting a survey to gather your valuable thoughts on the Game Development Specialisation. We aim to understand your experience and explore ways to enhance this program for future students.

💡 Your feedback matters! and we would greatly appreciate your input.

📱 Scan the QR code above to participate!

Have any questions? Feel free to DM us anytime. Thank you for helping us shape the future of game development at FCI! 😊

👾April 2026 Game Developers Club Welcoming Party!👾

👋Hello everyone, we will be hosting a welcoming party to celebrate all our newest members! Our senior members are encouraged to join as well😊

The theme for this event is black and gold but please don't stress yourself over it too hard if you don't have anything that matches the theme😌 

P.S. Don't forget to bring your laptop for something we have planned for the event😉 

📅 Date: 22.04.2026
⏰ Time: 7.30 pm to 11.00 pm
🏢 Venue: FCI Theater

🇲🇾🎮Happy 67th Independence Day🕹️🗓️

The Game Developers Club celebrates Malaysia's 67th Independence today and hopes that everyone is having a fun weekend😊. 

We just have one last thing to say, Selamat Hari Merdeka and have a Happy Independence Day everyone🇲🇾

🕹️🇲🇾GDC @ CSRW August 2024 🎮🏫

The Game Developers Club is elated😁 to showcase what the club has to offer for both new students coming in from this intake or older ones with an interest in game development🎮

Come around and see game projects that some of our members worked on for their Final Year Project and you can even test them out on our itch.io page😉 You can find the link to it on our LinkTree in the bio

So if this tickles your fancy then you can find us at the CLC, we’re booth #7.

If you have any further questions then you can just DM this page😊

🕹️🎃GDC @ CSRW August 2024 🎮💀

Happy Halloween everyone.👻 The Game Developers Club will once more be joining the CSRW for the brand new semester! We will showcase what we as a club will offer for both new students coming in from this intake or older ones with an interest in game development🎮

Join our club and participate in Events, Industry Visits and Workshops! We also have game projects and Final Year Project and you can even test them out on our itch.io page😳 You can find the link to it on our LinkTree in the bio🔥

If we have you intrigued and curious, do check out our table at table 12! And we can get along for this spooky season 🎃👻

DM us for any details and questions!!

🕹️🇲🇾August 2024 GDC Welcoming Party Highlights🎮📷

The GDC🎮 had hosted a welcoming party on the 30th of August to celebrate the start of the semester🎊. We were fortunate that so many people managed to come out and help give life to the event🎉. But now that the semester has come to a close, let's take a trip down memory lane to that time,⌚

A big thank you to the @mmuesports for helping us with the event☺️. But we should also not forget about the people who truly made the night special, our attendees❤️

Stay tuned for our next posts💫

caption:
🎮🕹️ World Building Workshop Highlights 📷🌏

Howdy everyone 👋, on the 8th of September we had conducted a world building workshop with @digitalblacksmith_school 🎨. Here are a few moments that truly captured the essence of the event🖼️. 

We would also like to give many thanks to the lead speaker for this workshop, Siraj Fakhri. We are very grateful for the Digital Blacksmith School for collaborating with us♥️. One last thank you to the people that truly livened up the workshop, our attendees😊

caption:
🎮⚙️Chaos in Unreal Engine 5 Workshop💻🕹️

We are very excited to announce our 3-hour workshop 'Chaos Destruction in Unreal Engine 5.4', and discover the secrets of creating destruction effects for your film and games😉!

The workshop will be hosted by our very own head of R&D @zubaidaszn 😊. She is an official Unreal Authorised Instructor and if you have been here for a while then you may have attended one of her earlier workshops😁. 

If you have any questions then please don't hesitate to DM us on here or you can contact this number as well:
Dzayed(+60-12397 6496)

👾2026 Game Developers Club AGM!👾

👋Hello everyone, we are pleased to announce the 2026 Game Developer Club's Annual General Meeting! Come around as we present the many events in the upcoming year😊. 

Take note that we are opening the event to everyone, so you can even invite your non-GDC friends to liven up the atmosphere🫂 

Join us by registering through the QR code above. 

📅 Date: 09.01.2026
⏰ Time: 7:30 pm - 9:30pm
🏢 Venue: FCI Theater

🎮⚙️ Chaos in Unreal Engine 5.4 Workshop Highlights 📷🕹️

The GDC had hosted an Unreal Engine 5 Workshop on the 29th of September📆. Here are a few moments from the event that we felt captured the vibe of the workshop📸.

We were joined by 70 participants from around the world🗺️. Malaysians made up a majority of them but we were also joined by a few Germans, Americans and Saudi Arabians as well. 

It was hosted by @zubaidaszn, who is our very own head of R&D. So a big thank you goes out to her🙇. But we also can't forget to thank the participants who attended the workshop😊.

🏆🎮 Game Jam Prize Pool 💰🔥

Ready to compete for first place? Here’s what’s up for grabs:

🥇 1st Place: RM1000 
🥈 2nd Place: RM800 
🥉 3rd Place: RM500

Sharpen your skills, bring your A-game, and show us what you've got! 💻✨

🕹️GDC High Committee Introduction Event Management🎮

Moving onto one of our smaller but no less important branch, the Event Management team.

This team is responsible for making sure that the events that we run are done so smoothly and have as few issues as possible. @chay_wut_chay is the leader of this team.

🕹️GDC High Committee Introduction R&D🎮

The next team we would like to showcase is the R&D Team.

The R&D team help to create the games that are displayed on our itch.io page as well as conducting some workshops like one of the Unreal Engine workshops. The leader of the team is @zubaidaszn.

🎮PlayStation Studio Visit🕹️

The Game Developers Club has a very exciting announcement, PlayStation Studio has graciously opened their doors to us🚪. Take the opportunity to get a glimpse of the inner workings of a AAA studio 😉

Below are the details of the visit:

🗓️Date: 6th July 2024 (Saturday)

🕐Time: 10:30 am to 12:15 pm

🏢Venue:
PlayStation Studios Malaysia, Imazium, 8, Jalan SS 21/37, Damansara Utama

🔗Registration Link:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfs8mztxd7nRRFKEuLYgqdSXBJ_IcLAWa_2XEBw3BqmEdQGkw/viewform

Do take note that the registration form is only open until tomorrow and there are a limited number of openings. Transportation is provided at MMU, more details will be shared later🚌. 

We hope to see you there😊

🎮GDC visits Playstation Studios🕹️

GDC members had the opportunity to visit Playstation Studios Malaysia! 🎉 Members who participated in the visit, attended a Q&A and were given a career guide by Buzz, who is the Operations & Development Manager at Playstation Studios Malaysia.

We thank Buzz for showing our members what it's like inside of a AAA studio, it was a very informative and fun visit. ❤️

We also wish to thank Playstation Studios Malaysia for giving us the opportunity to visit the studio!😊

caption:
🎮 Character Design Workshop April 2024 📚

Calling all artists 🎨, @gdcmmu will be collaborating with @thecomination  to present all of you the April 2024 Character Design Workshop. Take the opportunity to learn the principles of what makes a good character design and discover how to improve your own character's visuals! 🖼️

We're thrilled to have Siew Hong Lum @redridinghong , a lead concept artist at Passion Republic, as the speaker for the workshop. We extend our heartfelt thanks to @passionrepublic for their generous partnership in making this event possible.

🔗 Registration Link: 
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfrOcTikVfvmmROoGDNNOPfkm3BDEH8wPMvq0YmTWz4LKqWmg/viewform 

For more inquiries, you can contact us via DM.

🕹️GDC High Committee Introduction Secretary🎮

Next up is another small but very important branch, the Secretaries.

Our Secretaries are in charge of facilitating communication between our club and the faculty as well as making sure to note down anything important that occurs in a meeting. @njmdth is the Head Secretary.

🕹️GDC High Committee Introduction PR🎮

The GDC is very excited to unveil the current members of our high committee, starting with the PR team.

The PR team is responsible for communicating with both the general public as well as talking to companies for collaborations. The leader for the team is @dzayed_dreemur.
